class.help: Se Registran las personas que seran evaluadas en un evento evaluativo, junto con las competencias a evaluar, asi como tambien las aptitudes evaluadas junto con su resultado.
class.label: Evaluacion
class.name: EVALUACION

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_evaluacion as oi_evaluacion, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.c_resultado as c_resultado, t0.n_resultado as n_resultado, t0.l_aprobado as l_aprobado, t0.c_res_comp as c_res_comp, t0.n_res_comp as n_res_comp, t0.l_aprobado_comp as l_aprobado_comp, t0.c_res_objetivos as c_res_objetivos, t0.n_res_objetivos as n_res_objetivos, t0.l_aprobado_obj as l_aprobado_obj, SEC.policy, t0.oi_evaluacion as CODE, t0.oi_evaluacion as TEXT, t0.oi_evento as oi_evento, t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, t0.oi_evaluador as oi_evaluador, t0.oi_supervisor as oi_supervisor, t0.oi_pos_supervisor as oi_pos_supervisor FROM EVA02_EVALUACION as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.EVALUACION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_evaluacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_evaluacion asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:oi_personal_emp/@value}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_evaluacion as oi_evaluacion, SEC.policy FROM EVA02_EVALUACION as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.EVALUACION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_evaluacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_evaluacion asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:oi_personal_emp/@value}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:oi_personal_emp/@value}')/ROWS/ROW

assosiation.description: Registra las competencias evaluadas o a evaluar de un evaluado para un evento en particular.
assosiation.label: Competencias a Evaluar por persona
assosiation.name: COM_EVALU

assosiation.description: Tabla codificadora de Objetivos Generales por Evaluacion.
assosiation.label: Objetivos Generales de Evaluaciones
assosiation.name: OBJ_EVALU

assosiation.description: Objetivos propuestos para el período próximo
assosiation.label: Objetivos Propuestos
assosiation.name: OBJ_PROP

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.EVALUACION.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.EVALUACION.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion) as CNT from EVA02_EVALUACION Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and EVA02_EVALUACION.oi_evento={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

method.description: Calcula el resultado de las evaluaciones de Objetivos y Competencias.
method.name: Calcular

qry:select.name: qryClase
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $f in sql(' SELECT e.oi_escala_res, v.d_valor, v.l_aprueba, v.n_rango_desde, v.n_rango_hasta FROM eva05_escala_res AS e, eva05_valores AS v JOIN e.oi_escala_res INNER v.oi_escala_res WHERE e.oi_escala_res in ({%=#PARAM:@escalas %})
')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra las competencias evaluadas o a evaluar de un evaluado para un evento en particular.
class.label: Competencia Evaluado
class.name: COM_EVALU

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: FIND-COM-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.c_competencia AS COD, ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.d_competencia AS DES FROM ORG21_COMPETENCIAS WHERE ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.oi_competencia = {#PARAM:oi_competencia/@value}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-COM-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.c_competencia AS COD, ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.d_competencia AS DES FROM ORG21_COMPETENCIAS WHERE ORG21_COMPETENCIAS.oi_competencia = {#PARAM:oi_competencia/@value}')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código de Nivel de competencia requerido.
attribute.label: Nivel Resultado
attribute.name: c_nivel_resultado

assosiation.description: Registra las Aptitudes evaluadas de un evaluado para una Competencia en particular.
assosiation.label: Aptitudes Evaluadas por Competencia
assosiation.name: APT_COM

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.COM_EVALU.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.COM_EVALU.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(EVA02_COM_EVALU.oi_com_evalu) as CNT from EVA02_COM_EVALU Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and EVA02_COM_EVALU.oi_com_evalu={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(EVA02_COM_EVALU.oi_com_evalu,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(EVA02_COM_EVALU.oi_com_evalu,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and EVA02_COM_EVALU.oi_evaluacion={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra las Aptitudes evaluadas de un evaluado para una Competencia en particular.
class.label: Aptitudes por Comptenecias
class.name: APT_COM

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.APT_COM.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.APT_COM.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(EVA02_APT_COM.oi_apt_com) as CNT from EVA02_APT_COM Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and EVA02_APT_COM.oi_apt_com={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(EVA02_APT_COM.oi_apt_com,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(EVA02_APT_COM.oi_apt_com,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and EVA02_APT_COM.oi_com_evalu={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Tabla codificadora de Objetivos Generales por Evaluacion.
class.label: Objetivos a Evaluar
class.name: OBJ_EVALU

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.OBJ_EVALU.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.OBJ_EVALU.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(EVA02_OBJ_EVALU.oi_obj_evalu) as CNT from EVA02_OBJ_EVALU Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and EVA02_OBJ_EVALU.oi_obj_evalu={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(EVA02_OBJ_EVALU.d_objetivo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(EVA02_OBJ_EVALU.c_objetivo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and EVA02_OBJ_EVALU.oi_evaluacion={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.SUBOBJETIVO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.SUBOBJETIVO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(EVA02_SUBOBJETIVOS.oi_subobjetivo) as CNT from EVA02_SUBOBJETIVOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and EVA02_SUBOBJETIVOS.oi_subobjetivo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(EVA02_SUBOBJETIVOS.d_subobjetivo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(EVA02_SUBOBJETIVOS.c_subobjetivo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and EVA02_SUBOBJETIVOS.oi_obj_evalu={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Objetivos propuestos para el período próximo
class.label: Objetivos Propuestos
class.name: OBJ_PROP

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.OBJ_PROP.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion.Evaluacion.OBJ_PROP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(EVA02_OBJ_PROP.oi_obj_prop) as CNT from EVA02_OBJ_PROP Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and EVA02_OBJ_PROP.oi_obj_prop={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(EVA02_OBJ_PROP.d_obj_prop,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(EVA02_OBJ_PROP.d_obj_prop,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and EVA02_OBJ_PROP.oi_evaluacion={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
